# Huong dan lam viec theo cau truc cua ban

Muc tieu: Copilot phai lam dung theo cau truc ban quy dinh, khong tu y thay doi.

## 1) Cau truc thu muc bat buoc
- [ ] Liet ke dung cay thu muc can co
- [ ] Quy dinh file nao bat buoc nam o dau
- [ ] Quy dinh ten file/folder (quy tac dat ten)

Vi du:
- src/
- src/components/
- src/pages/
- docs/

## 2) Mau cau truc moi file
- [ ] Neu tao file moi, bat buoc theo mau nao
- [ ] Thu tu cac phan trong file
- [ ] Quy tac import/export

Vi du cho file code:
1. Imports
2. Constants
3. Types/Interfaces
4. Main logic
5. Export

## 3) Quy tac KHONG duoc sai lech
- [ ] Khong doi ten file/folder khi chua duoc phep
- [ ] Khong di chuyen file sang noi khac
- [ ] Khong them thu muc moi neu chua duoc dong y
- [ ] Khong thay doi API/public interface neu khong duoc yeu cau

## 4) Quy tac style va convention
- [ ] Ngon ngu/comment su dung
- [ ] Quy tac dat ten bien/ham/class
- [ ] Quy tac format code (lint, prettier, ...)

## 5) Quy trinh truoc khi sua code
- [ ] Doc va doi chieu voi file nay
- [ ] Neu yeu cau mau thuan voi cau truc: dung lai va hoi ban
- [ ] Neu thieu thong tin cau truc: hoi ro truoc khi lam

## 6) Checklist khi giao ket qua
- [ ] Dung cau truc thu muc ban yeu cau
- [ ] Dung mau file ban yeu cau
- [ ] Khong co thay doi ngoai pham vi
- [ ] Neu co diem chua chac: neu ro trong phan ghi chu

## 7) Phan ban dien thong tin cua ban (quan trong)
Dien day du quy tac cu the de Copilot lam dung 100%:

- Ten du an:
- Cac thu muc bat buoc:
- Mau file bat buoc:
- Quy tac dat ten:
- Quy tac import/export:
- Dieu cam thay doi:
- Muc uu tien (vi du: an toan > toc do > toi uu):
- Cach tra loi mong muon (ngan gon/chi tiet):

## 8) Cam ket thuc thi
Khi lam viec trong workspace nay, Copilot uu tien tuan thu file huong dan nay. Neu yeu cau moi mau thuan voi quy tac trong file, Copilot phai canh bao va hoi lai truoc khi thay doi.
